message:
test(fcp-conformance/device-fitness): pin FitnessScore scoring constants + eligibility gates + total order (resolves flywheel_connectors-ww5yq)

23 tests pinning DeviceProfile::compute_fitness — the device-selection
primitive every planner consults to pick which node runs an op. The
constants are PRIVATE so drift is silent unless pinned via observable
score deltas:

- BASE_SCORE = 100.0 (baseline)
- DERP_PENALTY = 30.0 (Derp class costs Derp+3×latency = 60 total)
- LOCALITY_BONUS = 25.0 (symbols_present)
- LOW_BATTERY_PENALTY = 40.0
- GPU_BONUS = TPU_BONUS = 20.0
- LATENCY_PENALTY_PER_CLASS = 10.0 (Local=0, Lan=1×, Internet=2×, Derp=3×)
- METERED_PENALTY = 15.0
- BEST_EFFORT_PENALTY = 10.0

Eligibility gates short-circuit to score=0 on requires_gpu/!has_gpu,
requires_tpu/!has_tpu, min_memory_mb not met, required_connector
absent. Score clamps at 0.0 under stacked penalties (never negative,
remains eligible). is_low_battery requires PowerSource::Battery AND
strict battery_percent < 20 (boundary at 20 does NOT trip). Total
order: eligible always > ineligible regardless of score; among
eligible, higher score wins.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
